home.headline: Cross-border clarity for life and business in Spain
home.sub: Boutique advisory for US persons in Spain and international clients.

about.title: About Iberia Atlantic Advisors
body: We are a Madrid-based advisory team supporting foreigners and international businesses operating in Spain.
Our work combines tax strategy, compliance coordination, and practical execution with trusted external specialists.
about.disclaimer: We are an advisory practice and coordinate with licensed professionals where required.

services.title: US/Spain Individual Tax
services.summary: Dual-country planning and annual filing coordination.

services.title: US/Spain Business Tax & Structuring
services.summary: High-level structuring and cross-border tax coordination for growing companies.

services.title: Annual Compliance Packages
services.summary: Calendar-based support for recurring Spain and US obligations.

services.title: Real Estate in Spain for Foreigners
services.summary: Tax analysis and transaction coordination for purchases, rentals, and exits.

services.title: Gestoría & Accounting Support
services.summary: Operational filings, bookkeeping, and agency representation support.

services.title: Non-US Foreigners: Tax & Coordination
services.summary: General tax guidance and local coordination for non-US residents and families.

team.name: Daniel Mercer
team.bio: US economist in Madrid; former Big Four advisor in the US and Spain with finance leadership in energy companies.

team.name: Lucía Gómez, Abogada
team.bio: Spanish tax lawyer focused on personal and corporate taxation, procedures, and tax controversy support.

team.name: Elena Ruiz
team.bio: Coordinates annual filing workflows and document tracking for international households.

team.name: Mark Delgado
team.bio: Supports federal filing readiness and multi-jurisdiction reporting for US taxpayers abroad.

team.name: Paula Serrano
team.bio: Advises foreign buyers on transaction taxes, ownership structures, and recurring obligations.

team.name: Iván Castillo
team.bio: Manages local registrations, certificates, and agency interactions with public bodies.

team.name: Claire Bishop
team.bio: Designs relocation compliance roadmaps for executives and families.

team.name: Sofía Martín
team.bio: Primary contact for onboarding, scheduling, and multi-provider coordination.

guides.title: First-year roadmap for US persons moving to Spain
guides.body: A month-by-month framework covering residency status, registration priorities, and tax calendar checkpoints.

guides.title: Beckham regime basics: who should assess eligibility
guides.body: High-level overview of eligibility factors, deadlines, and coordination points before applying.

guides.title: Spanish tax residency tests explained
guides.body: Breakdown of day-count, center of interests, and practical evidence taxpayers should maintain.

guides.title: Tax considerations when renting or buying in Spain
guides.body: Key taxes and filing implications for residents and non-residents acquiring Spanish property.

guides.title: US company expanding to Spain: first tax questions
guides.body: Initial checklist for permanent establishment risk, VAT, payroll, and governance coordination.

guides.title: Annual compliance calendar for international families
guides.body: How to organize documentation, milestones, and advisor handoffs for smoother annual filing.

faq.q: Do you provide legal representation in court?
faq.a: No. We provide advisory coordination and collaborate with licensed professionals for representation when needed.
